name: knowledge-base
description: 专业的知识库管理系统，旨在解决“知识诅咒”和认知偏差问题。通过显式化隐性知识、扫描代码提取领域概念、整合行业最佳实践，构建结构化的 Markdown 知识库。
capabilities: Scan code to extract domain concepts (classes, interfaces, types)
author: Dwsy
securitySummary: This is a legitimate knowledge base documentation tool. All static findings are false positives: child_process exec is imported but never used; backticks are JavaScript template literals for documentation generation, not shell execution; path traversal warnings are mitigated by explicit sanitization (lines 217, 225); hidden files are explicitly skipped (lines 149, 194, 288, 357, 423, 473); all operations scoped to project-local docs/knowledge directory with no network calls or credential access.
valueStatement: Teams struggle to capture and share domain knowledge. This skill extracts concepts from code, creates structured documentation, and builds an organized knowledge base with markdown files.
userTitle: Build Structured Knowledge Base from Code
limitations: Operates only on local project files in docs/knowledge directory
Does not sync with external documentation systems
No collaboration or version control features

useCases.title: Document Domain Concepts
useCases.description: Extract technical terms from code and create a shared vocabulary for the team

useCases.title: Generate Structure Guides
useCases.description: Build how-to guides and best practices with standardized templates

useCases.title: Record Architecture Decisions
useCases.description: Document why technical choices were made for future reference

promptTemplates.title: Initialize Knowledge Base
promptTemplates.prompt: Run init to set up docs/knowledge structure with concepts, guides, decisions, and external directories

promptTemplates.title: Scan Code for Concepts
promptTemplates.prompt: Run scan to analyze code and generate a list of concepts that should be documented

promptTemplates.title: Discover Documentation Gaps
promptTemplates.prompt: Run discover to analyze project structure and generate documentation checklist

bestPractices: Run discover before creating documents to see project structure and suggested topics
Document the 'why' not just the 'what' using decision records
antiPatterns: Skipping the common misconceptions section in concept documents
Creating deep nested categories beyond 5 levels
Using inconsistent naming conventions across documentation

faq.question: What file types does scan support?
faq.answer: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, Go, and Rust files. Limited to 50 files per scan for performance.

faq.question: How deep can category hierarchies go?
faq.answer: The tool supports unlimited nesting but recommends keeping categories under 5 levels deep.

faq.question: Can I use this with existing documentation?
faq.answer: Yes. The init command only creates missing directories. Existing files in docs/knowledge are preserved.

faq.question: Is my data sent anywhere?
faq.answer: No. All operations are local. The skill reads and writes only to your project's docs/knowledge directory.

faq.question: Why is my concept marked as existing?
faq.answer: The scan checks for matching filenames in docs/knowledge/concepts. Ensure document names match the concept name.

faq.question: How is this different from regular documentation?
faq.answer: This tool focuses on capturing tacit knowledge and domain concepts, not just API documentation. It uses structured templates with anti-patterns and cognitive alignment sections.
